createadvlogistics.package_wormhole.tool: Place in crafting grid to reset
createadvlogistics.ponder.package_wormho: Sending packages across dimensions with a Package Wormhole
Packages can be teleported to a wormhole in a different dimension.
Sending packages with a Package Wormhole
Place a Package Wormhole as a receiver
Right-click an existing wormhole before placing it to set the target position
Packages can be inserted manually or through automation
If the sending wormhole has charge, the package will be teleported to the targeted wormhole.
Packages can be extracted manually or with automation.
Package Wormholes can also input or output from a Package Frogport on top of them.
item.createadvlogistics.package_content_: _Matches packaged items_ against a collection of _items_ or _other filters_. Can be used in _Filter Slots_ of Create's Components
